title: The Blackwood Estate
logline: Seven strangers receive invitations to spend a weekend at the infamous Blackwood Estate, where each night reveals deeper layers of the house's supernatural malevolence.
tone: atmospheric dread building to visceral horror
setting: The Blackwood Estate - Victorian mansion in remote New England, built 1847, site of multiple tragedies

characters.name: Eleanor Vance
characters.description: Anxious graduate student researching paranormal phenomena, invited as 'subject expert'
characters.backstory: Saw her first ghost at age 7, spent two decades trying to rationalize it away through academic study
characters.goals: Prove or disprove the supernatural scientifically, survive the weekend
characters.conflicts: Her gifts make her vulnerable to the house's influence

visual_markers.physical: Pale skin, dark circles under eyes from insomnia, messy auburn hair always in practical bun
visual_markers.costume: Practical layers - turtleneck, cardigan, jeans, hiking boots
visual_markers.signature_items: Wire-frame glasses, leather journal, EMF detector

characters.name: Sarah Blackwood
characters.description: Victorian bookkeeper whose death sealed the estate's original curse
characters.backstory: Signed the Blackwood ledger during the 1893 murders, died resisting the patriarch's blood oath, now tethered to the estate as a warning whisper
characters.goals: Guide worthy descendants, prevent the house from claiming new victims
characters.conflicts: Bound to the ledger and furnace—can only manifest through blood or sanctified frequencies

visual_markers.physical: Translucent Victorian dress, soot-streaked skin, ember-glow eyes
visual_markers.costume: Late 19th century ledger dress, apron scorched at the hem
visual_markers.signature_items: Blood-stained ledger, rosary with iron beads

manifestation_responses: Whispers 'Not again' when the ledger is opened
Heat pulses through rosary to warn allies
Ash ravens swirl when her warnings are ignored

characters.name: Shadowed Killer
characters.description: Faceless patriarchal agent forced to carry out the estate's commands
characters.backstory: Original estate steward compelled by oath to silence anyone threatening the ritual—eternally bound to the furnace room
characters.goals: Fulfill the house's orders to avoid his family's torment
characters.conflicts: Cannot defy commands yet secretly helps those who resist

visual_markers.physical: Silhouette with indistinct features, coat soaked in furnace soot
visual_markers.signature_items: Iron poker, ring of estate keys

manifestation_responses: Footsteps in descending rhythm announce his arrival
Keys rattle when he wrestles with the house's orders

characters.name: Marcus Sterling
characters.description: Investigative journalist writing exposé on 'haunted house tourism scams'
characters.backstory: Lost credibility on a story, needs this exposé to rebuild career
characters.goals: Expose the Blackwood 'haunting' as fraud, find the con
characters.conflicts: Evidence contradicts his skepticism, past trauma resurfaces

visual_markers.physical: Mixed race (Black/Asian), athletic build, well-groomed beard, tired eyes
visual_markers.costume: Smart casual - button-down shirt, dark jeans, leather jacket, boots

characters.name: Victoria Ashford
characters.description: Descendant of the original Blackwood family, inherited the estate
characters.secret: Her great-grandfather committed the murders that cursed the house
characters.motivation: Trying to break the curse before it claims her

visual_markers.physical: Elegant, silver-blonde hair, expensive but understated style
visual_markers.costume: Designer pieces in muted colors - cashmere, silk, pearls
visual_markers.tells: Trembling hands she hides, won't look at portraits

characters.name: Father Thomas Rhys
characters.description: Catholic priest with Vatican training in exorcism

visual_markers.physical: Welsh, gray hair, weathered face, burn scars on hands
visual_markers.costume: Priest's collar, black suit, rosary, worn leather bag
visual_markers.signature_items: Holy water, Bible with annotations, blessed salt

visual_markers.physical: Japanese American, slight build, meticulous presentation

characters.name: Mrs. Cross
characters.description: Severe Blackwood steward who enforces ritual compliance with quiet authority

visual_markers.physical: Gaunt pale skin, tightly pinned silver hair, piercing dark eyes
visual_markers.costume: High-collared black mourning dress with lace cuffs, floor-length skirt, black gloves
visual_markers.signature_items: Brass lamp key ring, leather housekeeping ledger

characters.name: Groundsman
characters.description: Taciturn caretaker who manages the front gates and enforces arrivals with ritual formality

visual_markers.physical: Weathered pale skin, short graying beard, broad shoulders
visual_markers.costume: Oilskin coat, wool cap, rain-soaked leather gloves
visual_markers.signature_items: Ring of corroded gate keys, heavy brass lantern

characters.name: Interrogator A
characters.description: Lead agent with sharp jawline, dark suit, white shirt, thin tie, cold eyes.
characters.backstory: Federal interrogator assigned to high-value detainees.
characters.conflicts: Must keep partners in line while suspects play mind games.

visual_markers.physical: Dark navy suit, white shirt, thin black tie, short dark hair, five o'clock shadow
visual_markers.costume: Tailored suit with pressed shirt and muted tie

characters.manifestation_responses: Remains calm, uses silence as weapon.

characters.name: Interrogator B
characters.description: Senior operative with gray temples, glasses, measured tone, scar on eyebrow.
characters.backstory: Federal interrogator assigned to high-value detainees.
characters.conflicts: Must keep partners in line while suspects play mind games.

visual_markers.physical: Charcoal suit, olive tie, silver hair at temples, rectangular glasses, eyebrow scar
visual_markers.costume: Tailored suit with pressed shirt and muted tie

characters.manifestation_responses: Remains calm, uses silence as weapon.

characters.name: Interpreter Lopez
characters.description: Female intelligence interpreter supporting the interrogation, calm but observant.
characters.backstory: Former military linguist assigned to the federal task force.
characters.goals: Document every nuance and keep the conversation controlled.
characters.conflicts: Must remain neutral despite empathy for subjects.

visual_markers.physical: Latina, dark hair slicked back, piercing eyes behind slim glasses
visual_markers.costume: Slate blouse, black blazer, ID badge, communication earpiece

characters.manifestation_responses: Grips tablet tighter, leans forward when tension spikes.

characters.name: Matt Graver
characters.description: Seasoned CIA operator, relaxed posture even under pressure.
characters.goals: Control the meeting and steer decisions.
characters.conflicts: Must justify aggressive actions to military brass.

visual_markers.physical: Broad build, swept-back dark hair, rugged features
visual_markers.costume: Olive field jacket over pale shirt with ID badge

characters.manifestation_responses: Leans back casually yet eyes track everyone.

characters.name: Cynthia Richards
characters.description: Female analyst seated near the window, poised but concerned.
characters.backstory: Mediator between agencies during crisis response.
characters.goals: Ensure legal oversight of the plan.

characters.name: Secretary Burnham
characters.description: Senior official standing at desk addressing generals.

visual_markers.costume: White shirt, dark tie, standing behind mahogany desk

characters.manifestation_responses: Plants hands on desk when making a point.

characters.name: General Fowler
characters.description: Decorated officer seated left sofa, chest full of ribbons.

visual_markers.physical: Gray hair, square jaw, numerous medals

characters.name: General Cole
characters.description: Officer seated beside Fowler, attentive and note-taking.

characters.name: General Webb
characters.description: Marine liaison seated rear left, watchful.

locations.name: The Grand Foyer
locations.description: Two-story entrance with dual staircases, chandelier, portrait gallery
locations.atmosphere: False opulence hiding decay - cobwebs in corners, portraits with following eyes
locations.significance: First impression of the house's malevolence, portraits are 'watching'
locations.visual_style: Deep shadows, tungsten-warm light fighting cold moonlight through windows
locations.paranormal_activity: Portraits age/de-age, chandelier swings without wind, phantom footsteps on stairs

locations.name: Cell Block Bedroom - Eleanor's Room
locations.description: Guest bedroom that was once a servant's quarters, locked from outside
locations.atmosphere: Oppressive confinement, too quiet, air feels thick
locations.significance: This room housed the first victim in 1893
locations.visual_style: Pale blues and grays, single overhead light, heavy curtains
locations.paranormal_activity: Door locks itself, temperature drops, writing appears on frost-covered mirror

locations.name: The Library
locations.description: Three stories of books, rolling ladders, hidden alcoves, trapdoor to below
locations.atmosphere: Knowledge as labyrinth - easy to get lost, air tastes like old paper
locations.visual_style: Amber light from banker's lamps, deep shadows between shelves, dust motes dancing
locations.paranormal_activity: Books rearrange themselves, whispers between shelves, cold drafts from nowhere

locations.name: The Basement/Old Kitchen
locations.description: Victorian service area with stone walls, meat hooks, cold storage
locations.atmosphere: Predatory darkness, smell of old blood, feeling of being hunted
locations.visual_style: Harsh single bulb lighting, rust stains, standing water reflecting light eerily
locations.paranormal_activity: Phantom cooking sounds, shadow figures, violent cold spots, blood seeping through walls

episode_1_structure.episode_theme: Arrival and first night - the house reveals its nature

scenes.scene_purpose: Establish the estate's gothic menace, introduce two leads

beats.description: Car headlights illuminate rusted iron gates bearing the Blackwood family crest - a raven clutching dead roses
beats.visual: Crane down from gates to car, tungsten headlights cutting through blue dusk fog
beats.character_action: Eleanor (passenger) stares up at mansion silhouette, Marcus (driving) checks rear mirror nervously
beats.revelation: The house is larger and more menacing than photos suggested

beats.description: Gates creak open on their own as car approaches
beats.visual: Wide shot - gates part slowly, no mechanism visible, car hesitates
beats.character_action: Eleanor whispers 'It knows we're here' - Marcus forces laugh but grips wheel tighter
beats.revelation: The invitation/arrival was expected by... something

beats.description: Long driveway lined with dead trees, mansion grows larger, single window lit
beats.visual: Dolly follow car, low angle making house loom, one amber window like an eye
beats.character_action: Eleanor checks EMF detector - readings spiking already
beats.revelation: This isn't a passive haunting - it's active and aware

shots.description: Establishing shot of gates and car
shots.lighting: Tungsten headlights vs cool dusk blue
shots.character_blocking: Car center frame, Eleanor visible through windshield looking up

shots.description: Interior car - Eleanor's reaction to gates
shots.lighting: Dashboard glow on faces, exterior lights raking through
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor right frame looking up/left, Marcus left frame focused forward

shots.lens_specs: shallow depth f/1.8, face sharp background soft
shots.lighting: Cool blue exterior light mixing with warm interior
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor's face fills frame, eyes reflecting gate movement

scenes.scene_purpose: Gather the cast, establish dynamics, first supernatural event

beats.description: Victoria greets arrivals, elegant but tense, avoiding eye contact with portraits
beats.visual: Grand staircase behind her, chandelier casting dramatic shadows
beats.character_action: Victoria's practiced welcome masks fear, hand trembles offering wine
beats.revelation: The host is terrified of her own house

beats.description: Each guest introduces themselves, reasons for being here conflict
beats.visual: Group shot rotating focus as each speaks
beats.character_action: Kenji photographs architecture, Father Rhys touches rosary, Marcus records everything

beats.description: Chandelier swings violently, all portraits' eyes shift to look at Eleanor
beats.visual: Sudden movement, candles flicker, temperature drop visible in breath
beats.character_action: Eleanor gasps, nose bleeds, Father Rhys starts praying
beats.revelation: The house recognizes Eleanor as the psychic - she's the target

shots.camera: 24mm wide from balcony level looking down
shots.lens_specs: deep depth f/8 showing full space
shots.lighting: Chandelier key light, sconces fill, window moonlight backlight
shots.character_blocking: Victoria at staircase base, guests semicircle facing her

shots.lens_specs: moderate depth f/4, portraits slightly soft but visible
shots.lighting: Warm sconce light from below, cool moonlight from window
shots.character_blocking: Victoria center, portraits flanking, one portrait's eyes catching light oddly

shots.lens_specs: shallow f/1.8, blood droplet sharp, background bokeh
shots.lighting: Horror lighting - overhead shadows, blood catches light
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor touching nose, blood on fingertips, eyes wide

scenes.scene_purpose: First direct supernatural encounter, establish the haunting rules

beats.description: Eleanor lies in bed, unable to sleep, room too quiet, door handle rattles
beats.visual: Low light, single lamp, shadows moving on walls
beats.character_action: Eleanor sits up, reaches for EMF detector - it's screaming red
beats.revelation: Something is in the room with her

beats.description: Frost forms on mirror, words appear: 'GET OUT WHILE YOU CAN'
beats.visual: Condensation spreading, finger-written letters, Eleanor's reflection distorting
beats.character_action: Eleanor approaches mirror, breath visible, touches glass - it's ice cold
beats.revelation: A warning from a previous victim's spirit

beats.description: Door won't open, window won't budge, temperature plummets, Eleanor's breath fogs
beats.visual: Panic - trying door, trying window, frost spreading across ceiling
beats.character_action: Eleanor grabs journal, starts documenting - academic reflex under terror
beats.revelation: The house traps its victims before it takes them

shots.description: Full bedroom, Eleanor small in frame
shots.camera: 24mm from corner, high angle looking down
shots.lens_specs: deep depth f/8, entire room sharp
shots.lighting: Single bedside lamp, deep shadows in corners, moonlight strip from window
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor in bed left third, door right frame, mirror back wall

shots.lens_specs: shallow f/2.8, mirror sharp, room behind soft
shots.lighting: Cool blue moonlight, warm lamp behind, frost glowing
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor's back to camera, reflection facing us, words forming
shots.reference_needed: Eleanor reference from behind, mirror VFX

shots.lens_specs: shallow f/1.8, eyes sharp, frost in foreground bokeh
shots.lighting: Rim light from window, shadows under eyes
shots.character_blocking: Just eyes and frost spreading across frame

visual_motifs: Shadows that don't match light sources

color_palette.primary: Cool cyan shadows, tungsten warm candlelight
color_palette.forbidden: Neon, modern LED, bright whites, saturated colors

cinematography_rules.camera_movement: Motivated by character or reveal, never gratuitous
cinematography_rules.lighting_style: Natural motivated sources - candles, moonlight, single bulbs

horror_rules.tension_building: Silence more powerful than sound, anticipation over surprise
horror_rules.reveal_strategy: Show less than hide, imagination is scariest

director_mindsets.name: blackwood_cinematic
director_mindsets.label: Blackwood Gothic Lens
director_mindsets.description: Wide establishing shots, slow deliberate camera movements, deep focus compositions
director_mindsets.philosophy: Let the architecture tell the story - the house is the main character
director_mindsets.camera_approach: Locked tripod shots, crane movements, slow dolly reveals
director_mindsets.lighting_preference: Tungsten-cool split toning, motivated sources only
director_mindsets.blocking_style: Characters positioned to emphasize isolation and scale

director_mindsets.name: blackwood_handheld
director_mindsets.label: Handheld Possession
director_mindsets.description: Jittery POV shots, close-ups, subjective camera
director_mindsets.philosophy: Visceral immediacy - you ARE the character experiencing the horror
director_mindsets.camera_approach: Handheld operator, tight following, reactive movement
director_mindsets.lighting_preference: Harsh practicals, flashlight beams, deep shadows

director_mindsets.name: blackwood_formalist
director_mindsets.label: Formalist Haunting
director_mindsets.description: Symmetrical compositions, static frames, geometric precision
director_mindsets.philosophy: Kubrickian control - every frame a painting, unnatural perfection creates unease
director_mindsets.camera_approach: Locked-off tripod, precise framing, no movement except motivated push-ins
director_mindsets.lighting_preference: Symmetrical key-fill, single source overhead, moonlight through windows
director_mindsets.blocking_style: Centered subjects, geometric patterns, perfect symmetry
